vulnerabilities.description: Login trusts a client-controlled hidden field `isAdmin`. Submitting `isAdmin=true` grants admin access without valid credentials.
Login form lacks CSRF protection and includes a sensitive role flag in a hidden field, enabling trivial CSRF-driven privilege escalation.
HTTP headers reveal Apache/2.4.25 (Debian) and X-Powered-By: PHP/5.6.40. These versions are outdated/EOL and likely contain known vulnerabilities.
